message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage Whitesnake: Complete Evolution & Build Guide 2026",
  description: "Master the Bizarre Lineage Whitesnake Stand with our 2026 guide. Learn how to evolve into C-Moon and Made In Heaven, best PvP builds, and move sets.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e293b/fff?text=Whitesnake+Evolution+Guide",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Bizarre lineage whitesnake**: A Mythic-tier Stand essential for the Heaven evolution line.
- **Obtainment**: Primarily rolled via **Stand Arrows** with a low drop rate.
- **Evolution Path**: Progresses from Whitesnake to **C-Moon** and finally **Made In Heaven**.
- **Key Requirements**: Requires **Prestige 1**, high-rank boss kills, and 1v1 PvP wins.
- **Best Fighting Style**: **Boxing** and **Hamon** are the top choices for maximizing combo potential.
</Callout>

In the competitive world of Roblox's latest JoJo-inspired sensation, mastering the **bizarre lineage whitesnake** Stand is a dream for many players. As an S-Tier Stand, Whitesnake offers a unique blend of ranged pressure, crowd control, and the devastating ability to disable enemy Stands entirely. However, the true power of this Stand lies in its potential for growth. It serves as the foundation for the most prestigious evolution line in the game, leading players through a grueling quest to unlock the reality-warping powers of C-Moon and the god-like speed of Made In Heaven.

Whether you are a newcomer lucky enough to pull this Stand from an arrow or a veteran planning your path to the "Heaven" state, understanding the nuances of its moveset and the specific requirements for evolution is critical. In this comprehensive guide, we will break down every skill, provide a step-by-step walkthrough for the Pucci questline, and recommend the most effective builds to dominate the 2026 meta.

<Section icon={Swords} title="Whitesnake Overview & Move Showcase">

Whitesnake is categorized as a Mythic Stand with an overall **S Tier** ranking. It excels in both PvE farming and high-stakes PvP due to its versatile kit. Unlike power-focused Stands like Star Platinum, Whitesnake relies on tactical debuffs and ranged harassment to wear down opponents.

**Video Highlights:**
- Detailed look at the **Revolver** and **Disc Throw** ranged mechanics.
- Demonstration of the **Acid Rupture** stun and slow effects.
- Visual guide on the **Disc Extraction** special move which shuts down enemy abilities.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="tl-zn1n4_24" title="Whitesnake Full Showcase 2026" />

The moveset is designed for players who enjoy "zoning" their enemies while maintaining the ability to punish close-range aggression. Below is a breakdown of the core abilities available to every Whitesnake user.

| Key | Move Name | Type | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **E** | **Barrage** | Melee | Standard rapid-fire punches dealing consistent damage. |
| **R** | **Sweep Kick** | Melee | A powerful kick that knocks back enemies and creates space. |
| **Z** | **Revolver** | Ranged | Fires a high-damage projectile with long range and fast travel time. |
| **X** | **Disc Throw** | Ranged | Throws three discs in different directions, causing burn damage. |
| **C** | **Acid Rupture** | AOE | Creates an acidic pool that slows, stuns, and damages targets. |
| **V** | **Disc Extraction** | Special | The signature move; extracts the enemy's Stand, disabling their skills. |

<Callout type="tip" title="Combat Strategy">
Always initiate with **Acid Rupture (C)** to slow your opponent before following up with **Revolver (Z)** for guaranteed hits. The slow effect makes it nearly impossible for enemies to dodge your projectiles.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Map} title="How to Obtain Whitesnake">

Getting your hands on a **bizarre lineage whitesnake** is largely a matter of luck and persistence. It is one of the rarer pulls from the standard Stand Arrow pool. Because of its Mythic status, you should expect to spend a significant amount of Arrows and potentially use Pity systems if available in the current update.

<CardGrid cols={2}>
  <Card title="Stand Arrow Method">
    - **Rarity**: Mythic / S-Tier.
    - Requires multiple attempts (stock up on Arrows).
    - Best for players with high luck stats or active Pity.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Preparation Tips">
    - Farm at least 50+ Arrows before a rolling session.
    - Ensure you have an empty Stand slot or a Stand Storage item.
    - Reach Level 30+ to ensure you have enough points for the skill tree.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

<Callout type="warning" title="Don't Rush the Roll">
Whitesnake requires **100 points** for its full Awakening. If you roll it early, focus on leveling your character to maximize its potential before taking it into ranked PvP matches.
</Callout>

| Method | Success Rate | Cost | Recommended For |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Standard Arrow** | Low (Mythic) | 1 Arrow | All Players |
| **Lucky Arrow** | Medium | 1 Lucky Arrow | High-end Traders |
| **Trading** | Guaranteed | Varies by Market | Players with rare items |

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="The Journey to C-Moon: Step-by-Step">

Once you have secured Whitesnake, your next goal is to evolve it into **C-Moon**. This is the first major milestone in the "Heaven" progression. This process is not a simple item craft; it involves a complex questline assigned by the NPC **Pucci**, located in the Graveyard.

**Video Highlights:**
- Location of Pucci in the Graveyard near the castle.
- How to manage the S-Grade boss requirements effectively.
- Preview of the C-Moon "Gravity" moveset.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="5HBS2YWpUVg" title="How to Get C-Moon Progression Guide" />

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Meet the Requirements">
    Before Pucci will even speak to you about evolution, you must reach **Prestige 1**. This requires your character to be **Level 50** and possess **10,000 Cash**. Prestiging will reset your level but is mandatory for further Stand growth.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="The First Trial (S-Grade Bosses)">
    After talking to Pucci at the Graveyard, you must complete "Journey to Heaven 1." This requires you to defeat **every boss in the game (except Avdol) three times each** while achieving an **S Grade** on each kill.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="PvP & World Events">
    Next, you must prove your worth in combat. You are required to win **10 Ranked 1v1 PvP matches** and win **3 World Events**. This demonstrates your mastery over the Whitesnake mechanics.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="The Final Sacrifice">
    Collect **7 DIO's Bones** (obtained from Raids or Chests) and the **Green Baby** item. Submit these to Pucci to trigger the final evolution into C-Moon.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="success" title="Evolution Success">
Upon completion, your Whitesnake will transform into C-Moon. This Stand features a unique "Levitation" pose and powerful gravity-based attacks that can stack damage rapidly.
</Callout>

| Requirement | Quantity | Rank Needed | Source |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Prestige** | 1 | N/A | Level 50 + 10k Cash |
| **Boss Kills** | 3 per boss | **S Grade** | World Map Bosses |
| **1v1 Wins** | 10 | N/A | Ranked PvP Board |
| **DIO Bones** | 7 | N/A | Raids / Chests |

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Unlocking Made In Heaven (MIH)">

Made In Heaven is the final evolution and is widely considered the strongest mobility Stand in Bizarre Lineage. The requirements for MIH are significantly more difficult than C-Moon and are designed for endgame players.

<Checklist
  id="mih-requirements"
  title="Made In Heaven Milestone Checklist:"
  items={[
    "Already own C-Moon Stand",
    "Reach Prestige 2 or higher",
    "Defeat every boss SOLO three times each with SSS Grade",
    "Win 15 World Events",
    "Speak to Pucci for the final evolution"
  ]}
/>

<Callout type="warning" title="Solo Requirement">
The SSS Grade boss kills for Made In Heaven **must be done solo**. Bringing a party or receiving outside help will invalidate the progress for that specific kill.
</Callout>

The SSS Grade is the hardest part of this quest. To achieve it, you must deal massive damage quickly while taking minimal hits. Using a high-DPS fighting style like **Boxing** is almost mandatory for this stage of the **bizarre lineage whitesnake** evolution path.

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Best Builds & Fighting Styles">

To maximize the effectiveness of Whitesnake and its evolutions, you must pair it with a compatible Fighting Style. In the 2026 meta, the community has identified two primary builds that outperform all others.

<CardGrid cols={2}>
  <Card title="The Boxing Build (PvP Meta)">
    - **Pros**: High HP boost, fast combos, great stuns.
    - **Synergy**: Boxing's stuns allow you to land the **Disc Extraction** move much easier.
    - **Verdict**: Best for competitive players.
  </Card>
  <Card title="The Hamon Build (PvE/Hybrid)">
    - **Pros**: Increased damage output, defense buff.
    - **Synergy**: Enhances the burn damage from **Disc Throw** and overall projectile power.
    - **Verdict**: Great for farming bosses and raids.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

| Style | PvP Rank | PvE Rank | Key Benefit |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Boxing** | ★★★★★ | ★★★★☆ | Massive HP & Stun combos |
| **Hamon** | ★★★★☆ | ★★★★★ | Raw Damage & Defense |
| **Kendo** | ★★★☆☆ | ★★★☆☆ | Speed & Range |
| **Vampirism** | ★★☆☆☆ | ★★★★☆ | Health Regen (Weak to Hamon) |

<Callout type="info" title="Expert Recommendation">
Most top-tier players prefer **Boxing**. The added survivability is crucial when you are trying to complete the SSS Grade solo boss kills for the Made In Heaven questline.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Bizarre Lineage Whitesnake FAQ">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "How do I get the bizarre lineage whitesnake Stand?",
    answer: "Whitesnake is obtained by using a Stand Arrow. It is a Mythic rarity Stand, so it may take many attempts to roll successfully."
  },
  {
    question: "Do I lose my evolution progress if I Prestige?",
    answer: "No. Once you have unlocked C-Moon or Made In Heaven, prestiging will reset your character level but your Stand will remain in its evolved form."
  },
  {
    question: "What is the best way to get DIO's Bones?",
    answer: "The most reliable way to farm DIO's Bones is by participating in the DIO Boss Raid. They can also occasionally be found in high-tier chests around the map."
  },
  {
    question: "Can I skip the Whitesnake quest and get C-Moon directly?",
    answer: "No. C-Moon is a direct evolution of Whitesnake. You must own Whitesnake and complete Pucci's questline to evolve it."
  }
]} />

</Section>
